# pico-celery

> Seamless integration between Pico-IoC and Celery for distributed task processing

## Docs

- [Home](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-celery/)
- [Getting Started](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-celery/getting-started/)
- [Architecture](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-celery/architecture/)
- [Retry with Backoff](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-celery/how-to/retry/)
- [Testing Without a Broker](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-celery/how-to/testing/)
- [Periodic Tasks](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-celery/how-to/periodic-tasks/)
- [API Reference](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-celery/reference/)
- [AI Coding Skills](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-celery/skills/)
- [FAQ](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-celery/faq/)
- [Troubleshooting](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-celery/troubleshooting/)

## For agents

- [Full docs in one file](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-celery/llms-full.txt)
- [AGENTS.md (conventions and boundaries)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dperezcabrera/pico-celery/main/AGENTS.md)
- [Flagship use case (whole ecosystem wired)](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-boot/flagship/)
- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/pico-celery/)
